goal: Terminate recursive derivative expansion with one automation-owned workflow-observation rollup envelope while preserving fail-closed validation, bounded evidence, and zero manual user tasks.
publication_chain: validate-chain-continuation generates and embeds the run receipt
full-validation-chain-report artifact transfers it to build-pages
build-pages publishes and reconciles bounded observation, transition, trend, frequency, stability, comparison, and history records
build-pages generates one terminal rollup envelope pointing to the latest governed artifacts
the terminal rollup records local presence, generation ownership, public endpoints, and fail-closed completeness without semantic reclassification
verify-public-pages checks the terminal rollup endpoint and the referenced public endpoint set
cancelled_run_policy: A cancelled run remains fail-closed and the next repository-owned trigger re-evaluates automatically.
external_evidence_policy: Missing external evidence remains deferred under declared owners and does not become a user task.
non_claims: This status proves automation contracts, not a successful future workflow run.
The terminal rollup reports pointers, presence, ownership, and bounded completeness only.
The rollup does not reinterpret scientific, governance, authority, or admissibility meaning.
It does not grant merge, release, deployment, publication, execution, or downstream mutation authority.
